title: Admin Console
subtitle: System-level administration. Manage tenants, providers and audit history.

providers.title: Provider Credentials
providers.subtitle: Encrypted credentials are stored at rest and shared across the platform.
providers.label: Label
providers.in_use: Cannot delete: numbers are using this credential.
providers.margins_help: Used to calculate credit price unless an account override applies.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Tenant workspaces hosted on the platform.
accounts.delete_confirm: Soft-delete this account? Its data is preserved but it will be marked as deleted.
accounts.slug_hint: Auto-generated from the name; cannot be changed later.
accounts.use_help: Open this tenant's workspace as super-admin
accounts.margin_overrides_help: Override the provider's default margin for this account when enabled.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Every privileged action across the platform.

users.title: Global Users
users.subtitle: Manage every user on the platform. Promote trusted users to super-admin.
users.name: Name
users.self_demote: You cannot revoke your own super-admin status.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Global platform configuration. Changes apply immediately.
settings.credit_usd_rate_help: USD value of 1 credit. Lower = finer granularity (e.g. 0.01 means $1 = 100 credits).
settings.invalid_credit_usd_rate: Credit-to-USD rate must be a positive number (>= 0.000001).
